raw.message: Mystery Packs. Real Cards. Instant Buyback.

hook.summary: A PSA-graded Pikachu card on a pedestal is struck by lightning.
hook.visual_action: Lightning bolts strike a PSA-graded Pikachu card on a white pedestal against a clean white background.
hook.text_overlay: IF YOUR FAVORITE CARDS CAN EVOLVE...

scene_flow: Pikachu card displayed on a futuristic pedestal with lightning effects.
Lightning intensifies and the card transforms into a Raichu card.
Text overlay asks if the user's collection should also evolve.
Final screen shows digital packs and physical cards with download links.
on_screen_text: IF YOUR FAVORITE CARDS CAN EVOLVE...
audience_proxy: Male collectors and Pokemon enthusiasts aged 18-35 interested in card trading and digital assets.
